backend.changelog: SolidWorks now starts on the selected BOM's 3DEXPERIENCE tenant. If SolidWorks is already open on a different platform, unmodified documents are closed and SolidWorks is reopened on the correct tenant automatically; documents with unsaved changes prompt you to close them instead. Fixes 'content not found on the platform you are logged into' during Generate after switching tenants.

cadBridge.changelog: Starts SolidWorks on the correct 3DEXPERIENCE platform for the selected BOM, even after switching tenants in the gateway.
